label: HcFM
title: Human-centered Future Mobility (HcFM)
desc: Human-centered Future Mobility (HcFM) is a research program that focuses on the development of future mobility systems that are human-centered and sustainable. It is a platform for collaborative research and education in the field of future mobility.

label: Deep Traffic
title: NRF Basic Research Lab on Attention based Graph Neural Network Models for Urban Mobility Network Analysis and Prediction
project_title: 어텐션 메커니즘과 그래프인공신경망에 기반한 대도심 모빌리티 네트워크 분석 및 예측모델 기술 개발
funding: National Research Foundation (NRF) Basic Research Lab
desc: National Research Foundation's Basic Research Lab on Future Urban Mobility. The lab focuses on application of GNN and Attention Mechanism (transformer) to urban mobility network, both structural and abstract. ETA, routing, rebalancing, and pattern mining are the key areas of focus.

label: K-UTM
title: Korean small UAV Traffic Management (K-UTM)
funding: Ministry of Land, Infrastructure, and Transportation
desc: The project aims to establish a robust and effective UAV Traffic Management (UTM) techniques and policies in response to rapid adoption of sUAV for public and private purpose. Task 3 focus includes three dimensional airspace structure design, and optimal flow management in urban area. The research is conducted in collaboration with multiple international partners including NASA UTM division and NTU UTM research center.

label: Metropolitan Airspace Assessment for UAV
title: Metropolitan Airspace Assessment for Safe UAV Operations Using Real-time Population and Traffic Data
project_title: 무인비행체 운용 안전성 확보를 위한 대도심 유동인구 및 교통량 동적 데이터 기반 공역 평가 방법론 개발

label: TDA
title: Big data application for topological transportation network analysis
project_title: 교통 빅데이터를 활용한 대도심 교통 네트워크의 위상학적 분석 및 응용 연구
desc: Research on topological network analysis both on the surface and air traffic under active control. Main focus is to analyze the transportation network properties incorporating both topological and semantic data for optimal control of future autonomous vehicles.

label: UTM
title: R&D Planning for Aviation Information and Big Data Analytics for Safety
desc: Following the ICAO's newly enforced mandate to adopt data-driven risk assessment for Safety Management System (SMS), the Korean government is planning to establish Aviation Big Data Center in 2019. In preparation, research and development scope and requirements are defined based on preliminary big data analysis of aviation sector

label: ATFM
title: Probabilistic Air Traffic Flow Management (ATFM)
desc: Research on traffic flow management in the next generation air transportation system with focus on stochastic route optimization under free flight scenario.

label: ASM
